title: corydalis trachycarpa var. octocornuta
intro: Corydalis trachycarpa var. octocornuta, also known as Yunnan corydalis, is a plant species in the family Papaveraceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of alkaloids, including tetrahydropalmatine, which is believed to have analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects, potentially providing relief from pain, anxiety, and insomnia. In herbal preparations, Corydalis trachycarpa var. octocornuta is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and capsules for the treatment of various health conditions, including chronic pain, anxiety disorders, and sleep disturbances.
